resources.string: SSH is not fully configured. Please fill in host, port, username, and either password or private key.
LineCode has not been granted the Termux RUN_COMMAND permission. Please allow \"Run commands in Termux environment\" in app permissions.
Termux returned no execution result. Please ensure Termux version >= 0.109.
Timed out waiting for Termux to configure OpenSSH. Please ensure Termux has run the authorization command and enabled allow-external-apps=true.
Unable to create SSH config directory: %1$s
Termux returned a result, but no username or private key was parsed.\n%1$s
Termux is not detected. Please install Termux first.
Unable to read Termux setup script: %1$s
